definition:
1. that which is put together in order : 
2. a body  of troops, squadron, contingent , (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. the constitution of a state , ς. πολιτείας a form  of constitution, (Isocrates Orator) 
4. an arrangement of musical notes , (Aristotle Philosopher) 
5. a regular collection of writings, a work, book, doctrine , (Plutarch) 
6. = σύνταξις II. 3, (Aeschines Orator) (ML)
